sourcesContent:
const buildImageSet = (keywords, startLock) => [
  `https://loremflickr.com/900/900/${keywords}?lock=${startLock}`,
  `https://loremflickr.com/900/900/${keywords}?lock=${startLock + 1}`,
  `https://loremflickr.com/900/900/${keywords}?lock=${startLock + 2}`,
  `https://loremflickr.com/900/900/${keywords}?lock=${startLock + 3}`,
];

export const categories = [
  {
    id: "fashion",
    label: "Fashion",
    image: "https://loremflickr.com/500/300/fashion,clothing?lock=11",
  },
  {
    id: "electronics",
    label: "Electronics",
    image: "https://loremflickr.com/500/300/electronics,gadgets?lock=12",
  },
  {
    id: "home-decor",
    label: "Home Decor",
    image: "https://loremflickr.com/500/300/home,decor,interior?lock=13",
  },
  {
    id: "beauty",
    label: "Beauty",
    image: "https://loremflickr.com/500/300/beauty,skincare,cosmetics?lock=14",
  },
];

export const products = [
  {
    id: "1",
    title: "Wireless Noise Cancelling Headphones",
    category: "Electronics",
    rating: 4.8,
    price: 179.99,
    description:
      "Immersive over-ear headphones with deep bass, crystal-clear calls, and up to 30 hours of battery life.",
    images: buildImageSet("wireless,headphones,black,electronics", 101),
  },
  {
    id: "2",
    title: "Active Mesh Sneakers",
    category: "Fashion",
    rating: 4.6,
    price: 89.99,
    description:
      "Lightweight sneakers with breathable mesh upper and cushioned sole for all-day comfort.",
    images: buildImageSet("sneakers,running,shoes,sports", 111),
  },
  {
    id: "3",
    title: "Smart Fitness Watch",
    category: "Electronics",
    rating: 4.7,
    price: 129.99,
    description:
      "Track heart rate, sleep, activity, and notifications with a bright always-on display.",
    images: buildImageSet("smartwatch,fitness,watch,electronics", 121),
  },
  {
    id: "4",
    title: "Premium Leather Tote Bag",
    category: "Fashion",
    rating: 4.5,
    price: 119.99,
    description:
      "Elegant daily tote with structured silhouette, premium finish, and roomy interior pocketing.",
    images: buildImageSet("leather,tote,bag,fashion", 131),
  },
  {
    id: "5",
    title: "Ceramic Vase Set",
    category: "Home Decor",
    rating: 4.4,
    price: 54.99,
    description:
      "Minimal matte ceramic vases designed to pair with fresh stems and dried arrangements.",
    images: buildImageSet("ceramic,vase,home,decor", 141),
  },
  {
    id: "6",
    title: "Hydrating Skin Care Kit",
    category: "Beauty",
    rating: 4.9,
    price: 72.5,
    description:
      "Complete hydration routine with cleanser, serum, and moisturizer for daily glow.",
    images: buildImageSet("skincare,beauty,cosmetics,serum", 151),
  },
  {
    id: "7",
    title: "Wireless Earbuds Pro",
    category: "Electronics",
    rating: 4.6,
    price: 99.0,
    description:
      "Compact true wireless earbuds with adaptive EQ and low-latency performance.",
    images: buildImageSet("wireless,earbuds,headphones,audio", 161),
  },
  {
    id: "8",
    title: "Modern Accent Lamp",
    category: "Home Decor",
    rating: 4.3,
    price: 64.99,
    description:
      "Soft ambient table lamp with brushed metal base and warm-tone fabric shade.",
    images: buildImageSet("table,lamp,modern,home,decor", 171),
  },
  {
    id: "9",
    title: "Running Shoes Elite",
    category: "Fashion",
    rating: 4.5,
    price: 109.99,
    description:
      "Performance running shoes with responsive foam and reinforced heel support.",
    images: buildImageSet("running,shoes,sneakers,athletic", 181),
  },
  {
    id: "10",
    title: "Bluetooth Speaker Mini",
    category: "Electronics",
    rating: 4.2,
    price: 59.99,
    description:
      "Portable mini speaker with rich audio profile and up to 12 hours playback.",
    images: buildImageSet("bluetooth,speaker,audio,gadget", 191),
  },
  {
    id: "11",
    title: "Velvet Cushion Pack",
    category: "Home Decor",
    rating: 4.1,
    price: 39.99,
    description:
      "Set of soft velvet cushions with subtle texture to elevate living room styling.",
    images: buildImageSet("cushion,pillow,home,decor,sofa", 201),
  },
  {
    id: "12",
    title: "Vitamin C Glow Serum",
    category: "Beauty",
    rating: 4.7,
    price: 34.99,
    description:
      "Lightweight brightening serum that helps reduce dullness and improve texture.",
    images: buildImageSet("vitamin,c,serum,skincare,beauty", 211),
  },
];
